arts.ttl: Inside Salford City and how controversy-mired Ryan Giggs has become the most influential of Man United's Class of 92... but they're still losing £70k a week 10 years on
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: The messages etched on the corridor walls at Salford City's modest little stadium convey the hope that old-fashioned values and sheer love of a place might bring football success.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gets transfer wish granted as Man City kick January window into gear
arts.sum: Manchester City have struggled in the Premier League this season and it appears as though they are set to strengthen their side after a public appeal from boss Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Man United attacker 'rejects' loan transfer as ex-Man City boss launches 'seduction' offensive
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony reportedly turns down the chance to join Greek giants Olympiacos in favour of securing a move to Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Man City agree £33.6m deal for Lens defender Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City agree £33.6m deal with Lens for Uzbekistan central defender Abdukodir Khusanov.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: I’ll leave punditry and club ownership to likes of Gary Neville
arts.sum: The City boss will welcome Neville to the Etihad Stadium on Saturday as the champions host the former Manchester United star’s Salford team.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola refuses to bite after Gary Neville jibe at 'boring' Man City - as Spaniard reveals he has NO interest in following the United legend into club ownership ahead of Salford City FA Cup tie
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT: Guardiola was in no mood to settle old scores in Manchester on Friday, instead suggesting the job Neville holds as a pundit is one he could never take on himself.

arts.ttl: Abdukodir Khusanov: Man City medical tests 'approved' after agreeing £33.5m deal with Lens
arts.sum: Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov is reportedly given permission to undergo a medical at Man City after a €40m (£33.5m) deal was agreed between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Man City get the transfer window up and running as they agree £35m deal for wonderkid centre back in January's biggest deal so far - and a Premier League first - and £50m move could be next
arts.sum: Lens boss Will Still said: 'We know that there are negotiations in progress, things are moving. 'He's sick. He was in the gym today, but he went home. [But] after that, we're not going to lie to each other.'

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo transfer reality clear as Barcelona make final call amid Man United and Man City link
arts.sum: Barcelona have finally confirmed what the future holds for Dani Olmo after struggling to register their Spain international since making the £50million signing last summer.

arts.ttl: Man City strike deal to sign Abdulkodir Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City have reached an agreement with RC Lens for the transfer of Abdulkodir Khusanov, according to David Ornstein. According to David Ornstein of The Athletic, Man City have struck a deal with Ligue 1 side Lens for defensive wonderkid Khusanov.
